command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Where is hermes actually logging? (journal vs file) ==="
sudo journalctl -u hermes-gateway -n 30 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -25

echo ""
echo "=== /tmp/hermes.log size + last write ==="
ls -la /tmp/hermes.log
echo "--- last lines if any ---"
tail -5 /tmp/hermes.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Is webhook delivery reaching gateway? Test POST directly ==="
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w "direct POST to :8080/telegram: %{http_code}\n" \
  -X POST https://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: 65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}' --max-time 8 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Is the gateway actually using port 8080 for http (not https)? ==="
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "http POST to :8080/telegram: %{http_code}\n" \
  -X POST http://localhost:8080/telegram \
  -H "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token: 65b0642ca8a7fc2ae28fa8e8234895cd38fc88933dd9bf6a45157546c66b98a6" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{}' --max-time 8 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
